nidmp.name: Network Infrastructure Development & Modernization of Power Distribution System in NESCO Area (NIDMP)
scope: Upgrade 9 substations (Fakirpara, Balubari, Uposohor, Setabgonj, Panchagarh, Katkipara, Mahiganj, Dhangora, Niamotpur & Golahat).
Upgrade 4 GIS substations (S&D-1 Capai Nawabganj, S&D-1 Rangpur, S&D-1 Bogura, Chandipur Rajshahi).
Construct 4 new GIS Switching Substations including Miapur 21-bay & Katakhali 11-bay.
Lay underground 11 kV cable in core city zones.
Replace ~14 ageing 33 kV breakers and panels.
Add 2,000 LA / 2,000 DOFC / 2,000 MCCB sets and 2,570 distribution transformers.
Energy storage systems × 4 lots, IED + fault locator package, cybersecurity scope, training & workshops.

pdssp.name: Power Distribution System Strengthening Project (PDSSP)
scope: Strengthen and renovate 8 existing 33/11 kV substations.
Replace ageing power transformers with new 10/13.33 MVA & 20/26.66 MVA units fitted with OLTC.
Install 33 kV VCBs (36 kV, 1600 A, 31.5 kA) and PCM panels.
Replace 11 kV switchgear (incomers, line feeders, bus couplers).
Construct G+1 control rooms where existing buildings are inadequate.

substations.name: Godagari
substations.switchgear: 1 Inc + 5 Line Feeder + 1 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation
substations.control_room: No — existing control room retained (washroom & battery room relocated from 1st floor to ground floor)

substations.name: Katakhali
substations.switchgear: 1 Inc + 5 Line Feeder + 1 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation
substations.control_room: Yes — G+1 side extension to existing building, 12 m × 8 m × 2 floors = 192 sqm

substations.name: Matidali
substations.vcb: 33 kV GIS — 4 bays (2 Line Inc/Out + 1 Bus Coupler with Riser + 1 Xmer Feeder); no outdoor VCB
substations.switchgear: 1 Inc + 6 Line Feeder + 1 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation

substations.name: Sherpur
substations.pcm_panel: 02 nos. Power Transformer Panel, 01 no. Line Panel
substations.switchgear: 2 Inc + 10 Line Feeder + 2 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation
substations.control_room: Partial — finishing of new portion already built by BPDB (water-tightening, 38 mm patent stone flooring, drainage)

substations.name: Puran Bogra
substations.pcm_panel: 03 nos. Power Transformer Panel, 01 no. Line Panel
substations.switchgear: 3 Inc + 16 Line Feeder + 3 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation
substations.control_room: Yes — G+1 control building (3-storied foundation), 300 sqm / floor ≈ 500 sqm total

substations.name: Khonjonpur
substations.power_xfr: Relocation of 1× 10/13.33 MVA Xmer from Matidali (no new supply); RTCC supplied
substations.switchgear: Not in scope — existing 11 kV panels (2 Inc + Bus Coupler/Riser + 2 PT + outgoing) relocated to new control building
substations.control_room: Yes — G+1 control building (3-storied foundation), 225 sqm / floor = 450 sqm total

substations.name: Baludanga
substations.switchgear: 2 sets new 11 kV SG panels (per site note; no detailed BOQ line items)

substations.name: Arji Naogaon
substations.switchgear: 1 Inc + 5 Line Feeder + 1 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation

substations.name: Masterpara
substations.power_xfr: Not in scope (only 1× Station Transformer 33/0.4 kV, 100 kVA)
substations.switchgear: 2 Inc + 10 Line Feeder + 1 Bus Coupler + 1 Adaptation

substations.name: Hatibandha-1
substations.power_xfr: 1× 10/13.33 MVA, 33/11 kV (with OLTC) + 1× Station Xmer 33/0.4 kV, 100 kVA
substations.pcm_panel: 01 no. Power Transformer Panel, 02 nos. Line Panel
substations.control_room: Yes — G+1 control building (3-storied foundation), 200 sqm / floor = 400 sqm total

substations.name: Kukhapara
substations.pcm_panel: 02 nos. Power Transformer Panel, 03 nos. Line Panel

substations.name: Goyalpara
